payload.label: couch
payload.long_description: Close-up (~1.2 m) view of a dark brown/black glossy leather two-seat recliner/loveseat with pronounced vertical padded back cushions and stitched seam details; visible cupholder and padded arm on the right, creased leather surface, and both left and right edges of the couch are partially cropped by the image border.

message.content: {"label":"couch","short_description":"dark brown leather loveseat, cropped","long_description":"Close-up (~1.2 m) view of a dark brown/black glossy leather two-seat recliner/loveseat with pronounced vertical padded back cushions and stitched seam details; visible cupholder and padded arm on the right, creased leather surface, and both left and right edges of the couch are partially cropped by the image border.","attributes":["dark brown/black leather","glossy sheen","vertical contoured back cushions","stitched seams","built-in cupholder on right arm","padded armrests","two-seat recliner/loveseat","visible creasing/wear","partial/edge-cropped"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.2}
